problems.title: Positional Arguments
problems.description: Call the function 'greet' with positional arguments 'Alice' and 30. Expected output: Hello, Alice! You are 30 years old. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Call the function 'greet' with positional arguments 'Alice' and 30. Expected output: Hello, Alice! You are 30 years old.
problems.starter_code:
def main(name, age):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    name = 'Alice'

    age = 30
    main(name, age)

examples.output: Hello, Alice! You are 30 years old.

test_cases.expected_output: Hello, Alice! You are 30 years old.
test_cases.label: Test 1

test_cases.expected_output: Hello, Cnkeg! You are 32 years old.
test_cases.label: Test 2

test_cases.expected_output: Hello, Dolfh! You are 33 years old.
test_cases.label: Test 3

problems.title: Keyword Arguments
problems.description: Call the function 'greet' using keyword arguments. Expected output: Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Call the function 'greet' using keyword arguments. Expected output: Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.

examples.input:
age = 25

name = 'Bob'

input_3 = 'Output:\n Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.'
examples.output:
Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.
Output:
 Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.

test_cases.input:
age = 25

name = 'Bob'

input_3 = 'Output:\n Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.'
test_cases.expected_output:
Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.
Output:
 Hello, Bob! You are 25 years old.
test_cases.label: Test 1

test_cases.input:
age = 27
name = 'Dqd'
input_3 = 'Qwvrwv:\n Jgnnq, Dqd! Aqw ctg 47 agctu qnf.'
test_cases.expected_output:
Hello, Dqd! You are 27 years old.
Qwvrwv:
 Jgnnq, Dqd! Aqw ctg 47 agctu qnf.
test_cases.label: Test 2

test_cases.input:
age = 28
name = 'Ere'
input_3 = 'Rxwsxw:\n Khoor, Ere! Brx duh 58 bhduv rog.'
test_cases.expected_output:
Hello, Ere! You are 28 years old.
Rxwsxw:
 Khoor, Ere! Brx duh 58 bhduv rog.
test_cases.label: Test 3

problems.title: Variable Length Arguments
problems.description: Call the function 'sum_numbers' with variable length arguments. Expected output: Sum: 15. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Call the function 'sum_numbers' with variable length arguments. Expected output: Sum: 15
problems.starter_code:
def sum_numbers(*args):
    print('Sum:', sum(args))

def main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    args_1 = 1

    args_2 = 2

    args_3 = 3

    args_4 = 4

    args_5 = 5

    input_6 = 'Output:\n Sum: 15'
    main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6)
problems.solution:
def sum_numbers(*args):
    print('Sum:', sum(args))

def main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6):
    sum_numbers(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5)
    print(input_6)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    args_1 = 1

    args_2 = 2

    args_3 = 3

    args_4 = 4

    args_5 = 5

    input_6 = 'Output:\n Sum: 15'
    main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6)

examples.input:
args_1 = 1

args_2 = 2

args_3 = 3

args_4 = 4

args_5 = 5

input_6 = 'Output:\n Sum: 15'

test_cases.input:
args_1 = 1

args_2 = 2

args_3 = 3

args_4 = 4

args_5 = 5

input_6 = 'Output:\n Sum: 15'
test_cases.call: main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6)
test_cases.label: Test 1

test_cases.input:
args_1 = 3
args_2 = 4
args_3 = 5
args_4 = 6
args_5 = 7
input_6 = 'Qwvrwv:\n Uwo: 37'
test_cases.call: main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6)
test_cases.label: Test 2

test_cases.input:
args_1 = 4
args_2 = 5
args_3 = 6
args_4 = 7
args_5 = 8
input_6 = 'Rxwsxw:\n Vxp: 48'
test_cases.call: main(args_1, args_2, args_3, args_4, args_5, input_6)
test_cases.label: Test 3

problems.title: Keyword Variable Length Arguments
problems.description: Call the function 'person_data' with keyword variable length arguments. Expected output: Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York. Implement the logic in main(...) and match the expected output for the provided cases.
problems.prompt: Call the function 'person_data' with keyword variable length arguments. Expected output: Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York

examples.input:
name = 'Dave'

age = 40

city = 'New York'

input_4 = 'Output:\n Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York'
examples.output:
Name: Dave
Age: 40
City: New York
Output:
 Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York

test_cases.input:
name = 'Dave'

age = 40

city = 'New York'

input_4 = 'Output:\n Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York'
test_cases.expected_output:
Name: Dave
Age: 40
City: New York
Output:
 Name: Dave, Age: 40, City: New York
test_cases.label: Test 1

Age: 42
City: Pgy Aqtm
Qwvrwv:
 Pcog: Fcxg, Cig: 62, Ekva: Pgy Aqtm
